team_name: Kartavya: A Compliance Operations Layer for the Karnataka CCMS
summary: Build an AI system that converts disposed court judgment PDFs into verified, deadline-bound action plans for government use, addressing complex, inconsistent legal documents and ensuring explainable and verifiable outputs.
key_steps: extraction of verdict class, operative directions, and case metadata
generation of action plans by a rules engine
verification of extracted data against source text
optimization_claims: calculation of limitation periods by citing exact statutes
assignment of monitoring responsibility to departments by role designation
use of near-miss tracker and consequence chips for risk management
constraints_addressed: focus on decision support, not full automation
